stepTexts.0: Today we learn to hold on when it's hard. Warm up gently.
stepTexts.12: Keep going. You're going to pump for a long time, no breaking.
stepTexts.37: Now you'll hold. Touch the throat entrance with the tip, and stay there.
stepTexts.71: One more hold, longer. Touch your throat, four seconds.
stepTexts.75: You held to the end. Catch your breath.
